SentinelGuard is a multi-threaded Python HIDS/EDR agent built over 10 phases. It splits optimized event collection from a Flask analytics dashboard. Using low-level OS hooks (watchdog) and canary traps, its risk engine detects ransomware velocities, triggering automated containment to isolate threats while logging data to SQLite.
